videos.title: Tenu chadd ke kitthe jawan, Tu mera parchhanvaa 🩷 #arijitsingh #shreyaghoshal #samjhawan
Bewaqt’s Music Video Out Now | Feel the love  @khatth.official  #newsong #lovesong #khatth
videos.description:
Khatth’s eleventh track “Bewaqt” is a reflective song that lives in those quiet evenings when answers are unclear and memories linger. Built around mostly acoustic instruments, it feels intimate, like sitting with your thoughts as the day fades. The track captures that bittersweet moment when everything seems complete yet something lost changes it all. It carries pain with honesty but holds onto hope, where love and loss walk together and the heart keeps believing, even in distance.

Audio Credi

videos.title: A tribute to the heroes of 26/11 🪖 #maulamaula #nanapatekar #sukhwindersingh #2611attacks
videos.description:
Maula Maula, from The Attacks of 26/11 (2013) featuring Nana Patekar, is a powerful and emotional musical tribute to the brave soldiers, police officers and every civilian who stood strong during the tragic Mumbai attacks on 26 November 2008. Sung with incredible intensity by Sukhwinder Singh & Rooshin Dalal, this song reminds us of courage, sacrifice and the spirit of Mumbai.

Let us remember and honour those who lost their lives, and salute the heroes who protected the nation.

#maulamaula #na

videos.title: Pindaan De Munde - Rony Ajnali X Gill Machhrai | Official Music Video
videos.description:
Renowned music composer–songwriter duo Rony & Gill, celebrated for their distinct blend of contemporary sounds and traditional Punjabi elements, combine forces to release their own Independent music for the first time. Pindaan De Munde is a song that celebrates success without losing touch with one’s roots. It tells the story of boys who’ve made it big but remain grounded, never forgetting their past or the people who helped them get there. 

Audio Credits:

Singer: Rony Ajnali, Gill Machhrai
Ly

videos.title: Shikayat (Official Lyric Video) | Akki On The Mic
videos.description:
Heartfelt. Honest. Haunting.

Shikayat is not just a song, it's a confession.
Akki On The Mic bares his soul through verses that echo the pain of unanswered questions, broken expectations, and silent goodbyes. With raw lyrics and a minimal, evocative soundscape, this track speaks to anyone who's ever held on when they should've let go.

Now with the official lyric video, feel every word a little deeper.
Let the poetry hit harder. Let the silence between the lines say what you couldn't.

videos.description:
An outcome through a collaboration of some of the world’s best to ensure that Ramayana is presented with the greatest amount of Reverence and Respect. 

Welcome to the Beginning. 

Let’s celebrate the IMMORTAL story of Rama v/s Ravana. 

Our Truth. Our History.

Directed by Nitesh Tiwari, Produced by Namit Malhotra’s Prime Focus Studios and 8-time Oscar winning VFX studio DNEG in association with Yash’s Monster Mind Creations; Ramayana is being filmed for IMAX and will release worldwide: Part 1

videos.title: Saare Jag Mein | Aap Jaisa Koi | R. Madhavan, Fatima Sana Shaikh | Justin, Abhay, Aanandi, Raj
videos.description:
Tere dil se nikle, 
Jaayein to jaayein kahaan?

A tale of apologizing to your true love, ‘Saare Jag Mein’ from ‘Aap Jaisa Koi’ features R. Madhavan and Fatima Sana Shaikh in a pivotal point in the movie. Composed by Justin Prabhakaran, penned by Raj Shekhar and sung by Abhay Jodhpurkar and Aanandi Joshi, the prayer-like melody elevates the soul of the track. Let us know how you like it in the comments below!

#SaareJagMein #AapJaisaKoi #RMadhavan

videos.title: Maahi Mereya – Abhijeet Srivastava | Varun Jain | Shayra Apoorva | Official Video
videos.description:
Maahi Mereya is a soulful love song about that one person who feels like both a home and a prayer. It’s about a bond so deep, it feels like it was written by the universe itself.
With honest lyrics in Punjabi and Hindi, the song speaks of love that’s quiet, spiritual, and unshakeable. No drama, just raw emotion, soft melodies, and a promise to hold on, no matter what.
If you’ve ever loved someone beyond logic, beyond words,this one’s for you.

AUDIO CREDITS 

Composer - Abhijeet Srivastava
Vocal

videos.description:
Khatth's tenth track 'Woh' is a shimmering duet that captures the excitement and mystery of a relationship just before it is revealed to the world. Set to a nostalgic disco-inspired beat from the ‘70s and ‘80s, the song has a smooth, pulsing bassline that makes you want to move, whether you're on a dance floor or dancing alone in your room.

videos.title: A timeless classic of love and longing... 💔🎶 #srk #kareenakapoorkhan #alkayagnik #shaan
videos.description:
Asoka, a 2001 Indian epic historical drama film directed and co-written by Santosh Sivan, is a dramatised version of the early life of emperor Asoka, of the Maurya dynasty. 'O Re Kanchi' is sung by Alka Yagnik and Shaan, composed by Anu Malik with lyrics by Gulzar. Starring Shah Rukh Khan & Kareena Kapoor, Santosh Sivan was generally praised for the cinematography of the film.

A timeless classic of love and longing... 💔🎶 #srk #kareenakapoorkhan #alkayagnik #shaan

videos.title: Raazdaariyan – Sagar Bhatia | Prajakta Koli | Taaruk Raina | Raj M | Gaurav | Ginny | Official Video
videos.description:
"Raazdaariyan" delves into the emotional complexity of love, loss, and the untold stories that linger between two people. It evokes a sense of mystery, introspection along with love, longing & bittersweet moments. Lyrically, Razdariyan explores the delicate balance between vulnerability and restraint, painting a picture of a relationship where both individuals keep their most profound feelings hidden, unsure whether to reveal the truths they've kept locked away.

videos.description:
Enjoy the lyrical video of the iconic romantic song "You Are My Soniya" from the blockbuster movie Kabhi Khushi Kabhie Gham (K3G). Featuring the heartwarming chemistry between Hrithik Roshan and Kareena Kapoor, Sung by Sonu Nigam and Alka Yagnik, the music of this song is composed by Sandesh Shandilya and the lyrics are penned by Sameer Anjaan.
